title: Code Man Mod
description: Code Man Mod is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of unique items and specialized functional features to the game.
body:
**Code Man Mod - Official**

Greetings! We are proud to present the beta phase of **Code Man Mod**, a **Forge**-based project for Minecraft. This mod goes beyond simple items; it introduces terrifying powers to use on other players, each controlled through a high-quality, custom **GUI (User Interface)**.

---------------------------------------------------------
**CORE FEATURES & CONTENT:**
---------------------------------------------------------

* **MOB PICKER**: Instantly traps your target and renders them completely immobile.
* **STONE CONVERTER**: Petrifies players, turning them entirely into stone. You hold the power to revert them to their original state at will.
* **VOID MULTITOOL**: Instantly places a **Fallen Block** beneath the target and transforms the player into a fearsome **Fallen** creature.
* **KEVIN1545 SWORD**: The ultimate weapon of the mod. It grants instant teleportation and traps your enemies in an **inescapable cage**.
* **FALLEN BLOCK**: When placed under players, it locks them in position and slowly consumes their soul by transforming them into a **"Fallen"** entity.
* **DIRT ARM**: The ultimate tool of chaos! Create dirt walls, perform hand gestures, summon lightning upon your enemies (or yourself), and even warp or restore the world's geometry.

---------------------------------------------------------
**INSTALLATION GUIDE & REQUIREMENTS:**
---------------------------------------------------------

To ensure all features and transformations function correctly, please follow these steps:

1. **Version**: Ensure you are running Minecraft **1.20.1/1.12.2** with the appropriate **Forge** version installed.
2. **Required Dependency**: For animations and model transformations to work, **Code Man Mod** requires the **[MorePlayerModels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models)** mod. Please make sure to download and install it.
3. **Installation**: Place both the **Code Man Mod** and **MorePlayerModels.jar** files into your Minecraft **mods** folder.
4. **Launch**: Select your Forge profile and start the game!

**Note**: If **[MorePlayerModels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models)** is not installed, transformation features and character models may not display correctly.

**Created by: shady1545**
